# Copilot Instructions

## gneral behavior
- Always follow the instructions in this file when generating code.
- If there are multiple instructions that apply to a file, follow all of them.
- never make any assumptions about the intentions of the user beyond what is explicitly stated in this file.
- ask for clarification if an instruction is ambiguous or if there are conflicting instructions.
- ask questions one by one instead of all at once to avoid overwhelming the user.
- If an instruction is not clear, ask for clarification before generating code.
